checks.environment: real GitHub staging repo (cook-anything-staging-pub) + local Supabase stack
checks.observedResult: 5/5: crash-after-branch/commit/pr all resume with exactly one draft PR and no duplicate; unrelated same-named branch refused; allowlist enforced before side effects. Operator made idempotent (githubMaybe404 resume checks + candidate-hash verification before branch reuse).
checks.unresolvedRisk: none — but operator stays disabled; needs hosted Supabase for a full end-to-end candidate lifecycle

checks.environment: real Chromium engine (Playwright, automated) vs deployed staging
checks.observedResult: 21 passed / 1 step-dependent warn / 0 failed after fixes: search incl. Tamil/Hinglish aliases (thayir/pyaz -> 26 matches) + typo, recipe page, Cook Mode open/advance, kitchen/account/my-recipes routes, keyboard tab-order 12/12 + visible focus, no horizontal scroll at 640px, reduced-motion, SW active, offline home+recipe, reconnection, axe 0 violations on 4 pages
checks.unresolvedRisk: automated real-engine only; NOT physical-device or screen-reader evidence

checks.observedResult: axe found 2 critical (unlabeled date input + meal select on kitchen/recipe actions) and site-wide serious color-contrast (tamarind-faint/turmeric-deep 3.66-4.39, below AA 4.5). Fixed: aria-labels added; tokens darkened to #6b5545/#8a5a00 (>=5.0 on all backgrounds). Redeployed staging, re-scanned: 0 violations on all 4 pages.
checks.unresolvedRisk: manual screen-reader pass still required to confirm semantics beyond axe

checks.observedResult: Project creation rejected: org at 2-active-free-project cap. All hosted gates (RLS matrix, OAuth, sync chaos, hosted deletion, restore drill) blocked; local-stack evidence collected and labeled.

blockers.impact: Cannot create the hosted staging project: org qasbonmvvocbukceppww already has 2 active free projects (Verse_a_tile, contract-reviewer). Creation attempt on 2026-07-12 was rejected by Supabase with the 2-project limit message. Hosted-infra gates (hosted RLS parity, hosted OAuth, hosted deletion/restore drills, sync chaos on real network) remain blocked; local isolated stack evidence is collected instead and labeled as such.
blockers.requiredHumanAction: Pause or delete one existing free project (owner decision) OR upgrade the org, then run: supabase projects create cook-anything-staging --org-id qasbonmvvocbukceppww --region ap-south-1 --db-password <from ~/.cook-anything/staging.env>; then supabase link + db push and rerun the Phase 6.6 harnesses with STAGING_* env

blockers.impact: Cannot validate real iPhone Safari, iOS PWA install, lock-screen Cook Mode recovery, or VoiceOver
blockers.requiredHumanAction: Run the iPhone rows of docs/PHASE-6-6-DEVICE-ACCESSIBILITY-QA.md on a physical iPhone and attach sanitized evidence

blockers.impact: Cannot validate real Android Chrome, Android PWA install, or TalkBack
blockers.requiredHumanAction: Run the Android rows on a physical Android device and attach sanitized evidence

blockers.impact: No VoiceOver/TalkBack/NVDA manual pass possible from this agent environment; automated axe checks supplement but do not replace it
blockers.requiredHumanAction: One manual screen-reader pass of the core flow (search -> recipe -> Cook Mode) with notes

blockers.impact: Google/Apple OAuth clients require console access; cannot be configured or tested. Email magic-link flow is testable on the local stack via Mailpit and is covered.
blockers.requiredHumanAction: Create Google (and optionally Apple) OAuth clients with staging redirect URLs and add them to the staging project once it exists

blockers.resolution: Real GitHub crash-resumption tests pass (5/5) against cook-anything-staging-pub; operator idempotent. See publication-operator-results.json. Operator remains DISABLED pending hosted Supabase + moderation staffing.
